body:
which was not supported before, only function calls were supported.
I am also adding a simple test for `@apply_regionally` since it looks like we are missing tests for it. We should populate the tests as we find new bugs.
title: Support assignment `a = b` in `@apply_regionally`

body: This might be a better path to usability than exporting more functions / defining more syntax. Let me know what you think @tomchor .
title: Call `compute!` in constructor for `ComputedField`
